title: Mekanisms enhanced MC
description: A vanilla modpack with rpg features, create, end remastered and much more!!!(only for 1.20.1)
body:
> ### **Features** 
- Vanilla biomes overhaul
- Progression to the end renewed 
- New weapons and classes
- New sound(like the GUI sound or the biome sounds)
- New bosses
- More structures
- More types of villages and villagers
- Backpacks, Minimap, Acessories, block placement review and **More!!!**



**This modpack is exclusive for Modrinth**

**IF YOU FOUND AN ERROR, PLEASE REPORT IT**
